title: ProDec Decorator's Dozen 12 Piece Synthetic Paint Brush Set for a Smooth Finish Painting with Emulsion, Gloss, Satin Paints on Walls, Ceilings, Wood, Metal - 2x 1, 5x 1.5, 4x 2, 1x 3 inch
features: Ideal for water-based paints including emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), gloss and satin, as well as woodstains and varnishes
High quality pure synthetic filaments for smooth paint release and a trade finish with minimal brush marks
Shaped wooden handle for maximum comfort even during extended use
MORE INFORMATION BELOW in the 'From The Manufacturer' section - click on 'See More Product Details' or scroll down
description: ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating tools and accessories. The Decorator's Dozen paint brush set features the decorator's most popular sizes, enabling you to tackle a wide range of jobs including cutting in edges on walls and ceilings, painting doors, architraves, skirting boards, panels, window frames, cabinets, furniture, fascia boards, steps and more. The trade quality professional paint and varnish brush is made with high quality synthetic filaments for excellent paint pick up and smooth release. Featuring a slimline head for easy paint application and laying off set in a rust-resistant, stainless steel ferrule, it is ideal for all paints and is especially suited to water-based paints including emulsions (eg. matt, silk, eggshell), gloss and satin. With a shaped, carefully balanced wooden handle, it's comfortable to use even for long periods. The handle has a hanging hole for storage, which is also a great way to dry the brush after washing and let gravity do the work, helping it maintain its shape ready for next use. 2x 1" (25mm), 5x 1.5" (38mm), 4x 2" (50mm) and 1x 3" (75mm) paint brushes.

specifications_table.Included Components: 1x 3" (75mm) paint brushes, 2x 1" (25mm) paint brushes, 4x 2" (50mm) paint brushes, 5x 1.5" (38mm) paint brushes
